Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Estyr]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Estyr is a character who observes the sky.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Estyr is held up in myth and history as the Emperor's equal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr is a Regent with three skulls orbiting her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr weathered a shoulder-tackle like a solid oak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr's fists are extremely fast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr possesses skulls that she seeks to reclaim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr is the Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr launched a piece of wood at Baldezar Kern like a bullet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Estyr died from her wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Estyr has made accusations that Calder and the speech-writers agreed not to address directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr fights with seven spikes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr was levitating Jorin and Loreli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr uses spikes to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — There is a bronze statue of Estyr that dwarfs the Lyathatan and has skulls carved into its crown.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Estyr has three Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Estyr possesses Hydra skulls even when practicing her art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr was supposed to lead Shera and Bareius in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr is a woman who possesses Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr has the ability to Read the truth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr was involved in a battle at the top of the Rose Tower with two Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr's body left a hole in the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr is a character who was found mangled and burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Estyr has a warped face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — A small gray string gave off Estyr’s powerful, confident Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Estyr wrote a journal containing mentions of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Estyr is a place people fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Estyr is a ruler who prioritizes combating the Elders over politics.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr accused Calder of being enthralled by Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr has a scar-ravaged body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr accused the Steward of Elder worship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr accused Calder Marten of selling his soul to Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Estyr refers to a past fight or event that Shera's allies want to avoid repeating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Estyr is one of the remaining Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Estyr is a person Loreli has talent comparable to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Estyr is tall with blonde hair and skulls whirling around her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Estyr stated there was only one Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Estyr proposed dividing the world into four parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr could have collapsed the foundations of the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr is the Regent of the North and has been unable to be restored to her right mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Estyr prepared by unearthing a set of jet-black armor that resembled the Emperor’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Estyr arrived and attacked with an iron spike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Estyr wears black armor and drives seven spikes of the Blackwatch into an Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Estyr lounged on the edge of a stone coffin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Estyr's power rolled the coffin lid over Shera.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
